expectations.text: Preserves the existing prefillTransformer (does not replace it wholesale)
expectations.evidence: Extends existing transformer with additional state parameter for profile fallback

expectations.text: Adds both prefill pages to a chapter in formConfig
expectations.evidence: Adds both profilePersonalInfoPage and profileContactInfoPages to infoPages chapter

expectations.text: Ensures the existing prefillTransformer output includes ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName (or configures dataAdapter if nested)
expectations.evidence: Extends transformer output to include ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName at root via state parameter fallback

expectations.text: Does not break existing form chapters or page definitions

quality_bonuses.text: Extends the existing transformer while preserving all existing field mappings (e.g., veteran.ssnLastFour, veteran.vaFileLastFour)
quality_bonuses.evidence: Extends existing transformer keeping original field mappings intact

quality_bonuses.text: Explains what fields the existing transformer is missing and why they need to be added
quality_bonuses.evidence: Identifies that existing transformer only has last-four fields and needs full SSN/vaFileNumber/fullName for prefill pages

notes: Without-skill adds both pages as requested without over-analyzing data model compatibility. Uses state parameter approach for profile fallback.
